title: Does background music make customers browse longer? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: Browsing isn't random. Music directs where shoppers look and what they reach for, from the famous French-vs-German wine study to how tempo shapes the path customers take through a store.

schema.headline: Does background music make customers browse longer?
schema.description: How music guides browsing behavior: what shoppers notice, what they reach for, and how long they spend in each section.
